message:
✨ Add per-cluster vCluster operator install mission (#2924)

Two distinct AI missions for vCluster:
1. Client mission: installs vCluster CLI locally (existing, renamed)
2. Cluster mission: deploys vCluster operator via Helm to a selected
   host cluster with context-targeted kubectl/helm commands

The cluster mission button appears in the create form next to the
Host Cluster selector, making it easy to deploy vCluster to any
connected cluster before creating virtual clusters on it.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
